title: Five-wicket haul

infobox.value: * [Innings](/wiki/Innings "Innings") * [Run](/wiki/Run_(cricket) "Run (cricket)") * [Batting average](/wiki/Batting_average_(cricket) "Batting average (cricket)") * [Century](/wiki/Century_(cricket) "Century (cricket)") * [Nervous nineties](/wiki/Nervous_nineties "Nervous nineties") * [Strike rate](/wiki/Strike_rate "Strike rate") * [Not out](/wiki/Not_out "Not out") * [Four and Six](/wiki/Boundary_(cricket) "Boundary (cricket)") * [Net run rate](/wiki/Net_run_rate "Net run rate") * [Required run rate](/wiki/Required_run_rate "Required run rate") * [Runs Per Wicket Ratio](/wiki/Runs_Per_Wicket_Ratio "Runs Per Wicket Ratio") * [Hit wicket](/wiki/Hit_wicket "Hit wicket")

* [Overs](/wiki/Over_(cricket) "Over (cricket)") * [Wicket](/wiki/Wicket "Wicket") * [No-ball](/wiki/No-ball "No-ball") * [Wide](/wiki/Wide_(cricket) "Wide (cricket)") * [Leg bye](/wiki/Leg_bye "Leg bye") * [Bye](/wiki/Bye_(cricket) "Bye (cricket)") * Five-wicket haul * [Ten-wicket haul](/wiki/Ten-wicket_haul "Ten-wicket haul") * [Bowling average](/wiki/Bowling_av

(also known as a "**five–for**" or "**fifer**")[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) occurs when a [bowler](/wiki/Bowler_(cricket) "Bowler (cricket)") takes five or more [wickets](/wiki/Dismissal_(cricket) "Dismissal (cricket)") in a single [innings](/wiki/Innings_(cricket) "Innings (cricket)"), commonly abbreviated as 5wI.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Taking five wickets is regarded as a notable achievement,[[4]](#cite_note-4) equivalent to a [century](/wiki/Century_(cricket) "Century (cricket)") by a [batter](/wiki/Batting_(cricket) "Batting (cricket)").[[5]](#cite_note-5) In 2001, [Glenn McGrath](/wiki/Glenn_McGrath "Glenn McGrath") invented the tradition of a bowler raising the ball to the crowd at the completion of a five-wicket haul.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

["Eight five-fors and counting: Starc's record setting ODI pace"](https://www.icc-cricket.com/news/2194240). *[ICC](/wiki/International_Cricket_Council "International Cricket Council")*. 21 July 2021. Retrieved 10 November 2021.

["Fifer in cricket: What do commentators mean when they say that a bowler has picked a fifer?"](https://thesportsrush.com/cricket-news-fifer-in-cricket-what-do-commentators-mean-when-they-say-that-a-bowler-has-picked-a-fifer/). *Sports Rush*. 20 June 2021. Retrieved 10 November 2021.

[*Young Wisden: A new fan's guide to cricket*](https://books.google.com/books?id=BcOkAwAAQBAJ&pg=PA110). [A&C Black](/wiki/A%26C_Black "A&C Black"). p. 110. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [9781408165256](/wiki/Special:BookSources/9781408165256 "Special:BookSources/9781408165256"). Retrieved 30 June 2022.

[Fox Sports (Australia)](/wiki/Fox_Sports_(Australia) "Fox Sports (Australia)"). Retrieved 15 December 2025.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Cricket terminology

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/27/Lord%27s_honours_board_England_bowling_2021.jpg/330px-Lord%27s_honours_board_England_bowling_2021.jpg)](/wiki/File:Lord%27s_honours_board_England_bowling_2021.jpg)

The Lord's honours board commemorating English five- or ten-wicket hauls at Lord's.

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c9/Patel_scoreboard.JPG/500px-Patel_scoreboard.JPG)](/wiki/File:Patel_scoreboard.JPG)

Scoreboard summarising Samit Patel's 5-wicket haul. The bar chart shows the runs conceded (white rectangles) and wickets taken (red dots) in each over.

In [cricket](/wiki/Cricket "Cricket"), a **five-wicket haul** (also known as a "**five–for**" or "**fifer**")[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) occurs when a [bowler](/wiki/Bowler_(cricket) "Bowler (cricket)") takes five or more [wickets](/wiki/Dismissal_(cricket) "Dismissal (cricket)") in a single [innings](/wiki/Innings_(cricket) "Innings (cricket)"), commonly abbreviated as 5wI.[[3]](#cite_note-3) Taking five wickets is regarded as a notable achievement,[[4]](#cite_note-4) equivalent to a [century](/wiki/Century_(cricket) "Century (cricket)") by a [batter](/wiki/Batting_(cricket) "Batting (cricket)").[[5]](#cite_note-5) In 2001, [Glenn McGrath](/wiki/Glenn_McGrath "Glenn McGrath") invented the tradition of a bowler raising the ball to the crowd at the completion of a five-wicket haul.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

Taking a five-wicket haul at [Lord's](/wiki/Lord%27s "Lord's") earns the bowler a place on the [Lord's honours boards](/wiki/Lord%27s_honours_boards "Lord's honours boards").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

## Records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Five-wicket_haul&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]

As of 2025, only thirteen cricketers have taken a five-wicket haul in all three international formats of the game ([Test cricket](/wiki/Test_cricket "Test cricket"), [One Day International](/wiki/One_Day_International "One Day International") and [Twenty20 International](/wiki/Twenty20_International "Twenty20 International")): [Sri Lanka's](/wiki/Sri_Lanka_national_cricket_team "Sri Lanka national cricket team") [Ajantha Mendis](/wiki/Ajantha_Mendis "Ajantha Mendis") and [Lasith Malinga](/wiki/Lasith_Malinga "Lasith Malinga"), [India's](/wiki/India_national_cricket_team "India national cricket team") [Bhuvneshwar Kumar](/wiki/Bhuvneshwar_Kumar "Bhuvneshwar Kumar"), and [Kuldeep Yadav](/wiki/Kuldeep_Yadav "Kuldeep Yadav"), [New Zealand's](/wiki/New_Zealand_national_cricket_team "New Zealand national cricket team") [Tim Southee](/wiki/Tim_Southee "Tim Southee"), [South Africa's](/wiki/South_Africa_national_cricket_team "South Africa national cricket team") [Imran Tahir](/wiki/Imran_Tahir "Imran Tahir") and [Lungi Ngidi](/wiki/Lungi_Ngidi "Lungi Ngidi"), [West Indies'](/wiki/West_Indies_national_cricket_team "West Indies national cricket team") [Jason Holder](/wiki/Jason_Holder "Jason Holder") and [Alzarri Joseph](/wiki/Alzarri_Joseph "Alzarri Joseph"), [Bangladeshi](/wiki/Bangladesh_national_cricket_team "Bangladesh national cricket team") [Shakib Al Hasan](/wiki/Shakib_Al_Hasan "Shakib Al Hasan"), [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistan_national_cricket_team "Pakistan national cricket team") [Umar Gul](/wiki/Umar_Gul "Umar Gul") and [Hasan Ali](/wiki/Hasan_Ali_(cricketer) "Hasan Ali (cricketer)"), and [Afghan](/wiki/Afghanistan_national_cricket_team "Afghanistan national cricket team") [Rashid Khan](/wiki/Rashid_Khan "Rashid Khan").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*]

In 2018, [Afghan](/wiki/Afghanistan_national_cricket_team "Afghanistan national cricket team") cricketer [Mujeeb Zadran](/wiki/Mujeeb_Zadran "Mujeeb Zadran"), aged 16, became the youngest bowler to take a five-wicket haul in an ODI.[[8]](#cite_note-8) In 2019, Pakistani cricketer [Naseem Shah](/wiki/Naseem_Shah_(cricketer) "Naseem Shah (cricketer)"), also aged 16, became the youngest bowler to take a five-wicket haul in a Test match.[[9]](#cite_note-9) Afghan cricketer [Rashid Khan](/wiki/Rashid_Khan_(cricketer) "Rashid Khan (cricketer)") is the youngest bowler to take a five-wicket haul in a T20 international match; he was 18 at the time.[[10]](#cite_note-10)

Sri Lankan [Muttiah Muralitharan](/wiki/Muttiah_Muralitharan "Muttiah Muralitharan") has taken the most five-wicket hauls in [Test matches](/wiki/Test_cricket "Test cricket") with 67,[[11]](#cite_note-11) and Pakistani [Waqar Younis](/wiki/Waqar_Younis "Waqar Younis") has taken the most five-wicket hauls in [ODIs](/wiki/One_Day_International "One Day International") with 13.[[12]](#cite_note-12) The record for most five-wicket hauls in [T20Is](/wiki/Twenty20_International "Twenty20 International") is 4, which has been achieved by Bahraini cricketer Rizwan Butt.[[13]](#cite_note-13)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Five-wicket_haul&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: See also")]

* [List of cricketers with five-wicket hauls in all international formats](/wiki/List_of_cricketers_with_five-wicket_hauls_in_all_international_formats "List of cricketers with five-wicket hauls in all international formats")
* [List of cricketers who have taken five-wicket hauls on Test debut](/wiki/List_of_cricketers_who_have_taken_five-wicket_hauls_on_Test_debut "List of cricketers who have taken five-wicket hauls on Test debut")
* [List of cricketers who have taken two five-wicket hauls on Test debut](/wiki/List_of_cricketers_who_have_taken_two_five-wicket_hauls_on_Test_debut "List of cricketers who have taken two five-wicket hauls on Test debut")
* [Category:Lists of international cricket five-wicket hauls](/wiki/Category:Lists_of_international_cricket_five-wicket_hauls "Category:Lists of international cricket five-wicket hauls")
* [Ten-wicket haul](/wiki/Ten-wicket_haul "Ten-wicket haul")
